steps.title: Read which gene matters
steps.content: The graph data show that flies with DptA silenced maintain high survival after A. sicerae infection, while flies with DptB silenced drop to very low survival. That points to DptB as the key defense for this infection.

steps.title: Avoid overstating the genes
steps.content: Choice A wrongly credits DptA for defense against A. sicerae, Choice C overstates what either gene protects against, and Choice D says both genes together are strongest when the data isolate DptB's role. The answer is B.
